description: Style NoteThese shoes from fortune are a minimalist's reinterpretation of the classic derby. Wear these luxurious leather shoes with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers. Product Details Tapering toe slip-on style Derby shoe in blackLeather upper has stitch detailingLightly padded collar and tongue, soft sockliner for instep comfortElasticated gores on the sides of the tongue for a customised FitPadded footbed for all-day comfortTPU outsole with elevated heel and grooves for traction Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather parts Do not store in direct sunlight
